items.title: NASA shares iPhone video capturing Earthshine from Orion during Artemis II
items.summary: The iPhone footage, captured on the mission's second day, shows Earth's reflected light illuminating the Orion cabin. Watch it below.

items.title: China shipped a record 68 GW of solar in March - here's why it matters
items.summary: China's solar exports surged to unprecedented levels in March as a global energy shock is pushing countries to rapidly pivot away from fossil fuels.

items.title: Tesla just increased its spending plan to $25B - here's where the money is going
items.summary: Tesla's planned capex for 2026 is three times higher than what the company has historically spent. Its CFO said, as a result, Tesla will have a negative free cash flow the rest of the year.
